title: Supplementary Table S2. The specificity test of primer sets designed for the detection of hepatitis E virus (HEV) through a SYBR Green-based real-time PCR method
author: Kim, Jin-Ho
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: All data were analyzed using 2,500 RFU and the Cq criteria (<35.0). When the Cq result was over 35, all of these were negative by melting curve analysis. *Average of replicate experiments; **Average of triplicate experiments
steps_raw: All data were analyzed using 2,500 RFU and the Cq criteria (<35.0). When the Cq result was over 35, all of these were negative by melting curve analysis. *Average of replicate experiments; **Average of triplicate experiments
